games.name: Tangram Infinity
games.description: Place tangram pieces to form perfect squares. Hundreds of combinations, infinite calm.
games.tagline: Place tangram pieces. Form perfect squares. Find infinite calm.
games.pageDescription: Place tangram pieces. Form perfect squares. Find infinite calm.
games.lead: A meditative spatial puzzle for minds that crave order.
aboutParagraphs: Drag and rotate tangram pieces to form perfect squares. Hundreds of combinations, infinite calm. No timer, no pressure — just you and the geometry.
Each level is hand-crafted to teach a new spatial relationship, slowly building your intuition for shapes, fits and angles. The kind of game you open for "five minutes" and lose an evening to.

features.title: Hand-crafted levels
features.text: Hundreds of curated puzzles, each one teaching a new spatial logic.

features.title: Zero pressure
features.text: No timer, no scoring, no failure states. Solve at your own rhythm.

features.title: Pure geometry
features.text: Classic tangram pieces, modern minimal interface. Nothing more.

features.title: Offline first
features.text: Plays anywhere. Your progress is yours, on-device.

games.privacyPolicyHtml:
Overview

Tangram Infinity is a puzzle game developed by an independent creator. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data is collected, how it is used, and your rights regarding that data.

Data We Collect

The App itself does not collect any personal information. However, we use third-party services that may collect data:

  • Google AdMob — used to display advertisements. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data to serve relevant ads.
  • Game progress — your score and game state are stored locally on your device only using AsyncStorage. This data never leaves your device.

Advertising

The App displays ads through Google AdMob, including interstitial and rewarded video ads. We request non-personalized ads where possible. For more information: policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties, except as required by Google AdMob as described above.

Children's Privacy

The App is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so we can delete it.

Data Retention

Local game data is stored on your device and can be cleared at any time by uninstalling the App. We do not retain any data on our own servers.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, delete or opt out of personalized advertising. On Android: Settings → Google → Ads. On iOS: Settings → Privacy → Tracking.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.

Contact

drfly.prog@gmail.com

games.name: Sudoku Infinity
games.description: Classic Sudoku reimagined. No grid to fill — validate lines, columns and squares endlessly.
games.tagline: Classic Sudoku, reimagined. Validate lines, columns and squares — endlessly.
games.pageDescription: Classic Sudoku, reimagined. Validate lines, columns and squares — endlessly.
aboutParagraphs: Forget the static 9×9 grid. Sudoku Infinity rebuilds the genre around a simple promise: as long as you keep validating lines, columns and squares, the puzzle keeps going. Forever.
Designed for daily commutes, long flights, or that one bench in the park where you finally turn your phone on silent. Pure logic, no luck, no ads mid-game.

features.title: Endless flow
features.text: No grid to fill. Validate logic structures one after another, ad infinitum.

features.title: Daily streaks
features.text: Come back every day. Keep the streak alive.

features.title: Zero clutter
features.text: Numbers, grid, your brain. That's it.

features.title: Logic over luck
features.text: Every puzzle is solvable through pure deduction. No guessing.

games.name: Ball Contamination
games.description: Physics puzzle game. Shoot the right ball to trigger a chain reaction and contaminate them all.
games.tagline: One shot. Infinite chain reactions. Contaminate them all.
games.pageDescription: One shot. Infinite chain reactions. Contaminate them all.
games.lead: A physics puzzle where one perfect shot triggers everything.
aboutParagraphs: Aim. Release. Watch the chain reaction unfold. Each level is a tightly designed system of bouncing physics — your job is to find the one ball that contaminates all the others.
Equal parts billiards, pool and chemistry. Equal parts satisfying when it works, and infuriating when you almost have it. We promise: it always works eventually.

features.title: Real physics
features.text: Every collision is calculated. No tricks, no luck — just trajectory.

features.title: One-shot levels
features.text: Each puzzle is a single shot. No second chances. Just retries.

features.title: Chain reaction satisfaction
features.text: When the last ball turns — chef's kiss.

features.title: Hand-tuned levels
features.text: Every layout designed by hand for a specific 'aha' moment.

games.name: Infinity Rush
games.description: Test your reflexes with 4-button obstacle challenges. How high can you score?
games.tagline: Four buttons. Infinite obstacles. How long can you last?
games.pageDescription: Four buttons. Infinite obstacles. How long can you last?
games.lead: Pure reflex. Pure adrenaline. Pure score chasing.
aboutParagraphs: Four buttons. Endless obstacles. The screen moves faster every second. Your only goal is to react before your brain catches up.
The kind of game you challenge a friend with at 2am and end up playing alone for two hours. High scores compress time. Welcome to flow state.

features.title: 4-button reflex
features.text: Tap the right button, in the right rhythm, before it's too late.

features.title: Escalating speed
features.text: The longer you survive, the faster the world moves.

features.title: Score-attack mode
features.text: Your high score is your only opponent. Beat yourself.

features.title: One-handed play
features.text: Designed for the bus, the queue, the boring meeting.

games.name: CodeBreaker Infinity
games.description: Crack the secret color code. Classic Mastermind, rebuilt for 2026. Free.
games.tagline: Crack the secret code. Classic Mastermind, rebuilt for 2026.
games.pageDescription: Crack the secret code. Classic Mastermind, rebuilt for 2026.
games.lead: Mastermind, rebuilt for the modern attention span.
aboutParagraphs: A secret color code is hidden. You have a limited number of tries to crack it. Each guess returns clues — and from those clues, you deduce the answer. Pure deduction, no luck involved.
Includes a Daily Code mode: one shared puzzle per day for everyone in the world. Solve it. Compare with your friends. Become unbearable about it.

features.title: Daily Code
features.text: One shared puzzle per day. Same challenge, worldwide.

features.title: Mission packs
features.text: Hand-crafted level sequences with rising difficulty.

features.title: Streaks & badges
features.text: Reward consistency, not just brilliance.

features.title: Pure deduction
features.text: No guessing. Every answer can be reasoned out.

games.privacyPolicyHtml:
Overview

Codebreaker Infinity is a code-breaking puzzle game developed by DrFly Studio, an independent developer. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data is collected, how it is used, and your rights regarding that data.

Data We Collect

The App itself does not collect any personal information. However, we use third-party services that may collect data:

  • Google AdMob — used to display advertisements. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data to serve relevant ads.
  • Firebase Analytics — used to understand how players interact with the app (session length, mission completion, daily code participation). No personally identifiable information is collected.
  • Firebase Firestore — used to deliver the Daily Code (one shared puzzle per day). Only an anonymous session identifier and your Daily Code result (solved/not solved, number of tries) are stored. No personal data is linked to this identifier.
  • Game progress — your mission pack progress, badges, and streaks are stored locally on your device only using AsyncStorage. This data never leaves your device.

Advertising

The App displays ads through Google AdMob, including interstitial ads (shown between games, never while a code is active) and rewarded video ads (shown only when you choose to watch one to reveal a color or gain an extra try). We request non-personalized ads where possible. For more information: policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties, except as required by Google AdMob and Firebase as described above.

Children's Privacy

The App is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so we can delete it.

Data Retention

Local game data (progress, badges, settings) is stored on your device and can be cleared at any time by uninstalling the App. Anonymous Daily Code results stored on Firebase are automatically purged after 90 days. We do not retain any personal data on our own servers.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, delete or opt out of personalized advertising. On Android: Settings → Google → Ads. You may also reset your advertising ID or opt out of interest-based ads directly from your device settings.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.

Contact

drfly.prog@gmail.com

games.name: PackIt Infinity
games.description: Fit every item. Fill every space. Satisfying packing puzzles. No ad spam.
games.tagline: Fit every item. Fill every space. Earn your space score.
games.pageDescription: Fit every item. Fill every space. Earn your space score.
games.lead: A spatial packing puzzle that quietly turns into an obsession.
aboutParagraphs: You have a container. You have items. Your only mission: pack everything in, optimally. The better the fit, the higher your Space Score. The higher your score, the harder it gets to stop.
Like Tetris, but slower. Like Lego, but less painful. A satisfying spatial loop with seasonal levels and a Daily Pack challenge.

features.title: Daily Pack
features.text: One shared packing challenge per day. Compete on Space Score.

features.title: Seasonal content
features.text: New themed seasons with fresh shapes and constraints.

features.title: Star ratings
features.text: Every level can be perfected. Most won't be — that's the fun.

features.title: Fair monetization
features.text: Interstitial ads at most every 3 levels, never during a puzzle.

games.privacyPolicyHtml:
Overview

PackIt Infinity is a spatial packing puzzle game developed by DrFly Studio, an independent developer. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data is collected, how it is used, and your rights regarding that data.

Data We Collect

The App itself does not collect any personal information. However, we use third-party services that may collect data:

  • Google AdMob — used to display advertisements. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data to serve relevant ads.
  • Firebase Analytics — used to understand how players interact with the app (session length, level completion rates, Space Score averages). No personally identifiable information is collected.
  • Firebase Firestore — used to deliver the Daily Pack (one shared packing challenge per day). Only an anonymous session identifier and your Daily Pack result (completed/not completed, space score achieved) are stored. No personal data is linked to this identifier.
  • Game progress — your season progress, star ratings, and daily streak are stored locally on your device only using AsyncStorage. This data never leaves your device.

Advertising

The App displays ads through Google AdMob, including interstitial ads (shown between levels, at most once every three levels, never during a puzzle) and rewarded video ads (shown only when you choose to watch one for an optimal hint or extra moves). We request non-personalized ads where possible. For more information: policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties, except as required by Google AdMob and Firebase as described above.

Children's Privacy

The App is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so we can delete it.

Data Retention

Local game data (season progress, star ratings, settings) is stored on your device and can be cleared at any time by uninstalling the App. Anonymous Daily Pack results stored on Firebase are automatically purged after 90 days. We do not retain any personal data on our own servers.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, delete or opt out of personalized advertising. On Android: Settings → Google → Ads. You may also reset your advertising ID or opt out of interest-based ads directly from your device settings.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.

Contact

drfly.prog@gmail.com

games.name: Deductia Infinity
games.description: Logic grid puzzles with stories. Deduce, eliminate, solve. No ads mid-game.
games.tagline: Logic grid puzzles, with stories. Deduce. Eliminate. Solve.
games.pageDescription: Logic grid puzzles, with stories. Deduce. Eliminate. Solve.
games.lead: Five suspects. Five clues. One conclusion that only logic can reach.
aboutParagraphs: Deductia is a logic-grid puzzle game with stories. Each puzzle is a tiny mystery: combine the clues, eliminate the impossible, and find the only consistent answer.
Inspired by classic Einstein-style riddles, modernized with elegant UX, daily challenges and zero ads in the middle of your reasoning.

features.title: Logic grids
features.text: Tap to mark, eliminate, deduce. The grid is your scratchpad.

features.title: Stories
features.text: Every puzzle has a setting and a twist. Logic, with a soul.

features.title: Daily challenge
features.text: One puzzle per day. Streak rewards for the persistent.

features.title: No ads mid-puzzle
features.text: Ads only between puzzles, never while you think.

games.privacyPolicyHtml:
Overview

Data We Collect

  • Firebase Analytics — used to understand how players interact with the app (session length, level completion, retention). No personally identifiable information is collected.
  • Game progress — your puzzle progress, daily challenge streaks, and star ratings are stored locally on your device only using AsyncStorage. This data never leaves your device.

Advertising

The App displays ads through Google AdMob, including interstitial ads (shown between puzzles, never during gameplay) and rewarded video ads (shown only when you choose to watch one for a hint). We request non-personalized ads where possible. For more information: policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties, except as required by Google AdMob and Firebase as described above.

Children's Privacy

Your Rights

games.name: MathDice Infinity
games.description: Combine 6 dice with math operations to reach the target. Level up your mental math.
games.tagline: Combine dice. Reach the target. Sharpen your mental math.
games.pageDescription: Combine dice. Reach the target. Sharpen your mental math.
games.lead: Mental math, reframed as a satisfying puzzle.
aboutParagraphs: Six dice. Four operations. One target number. Combine them in any order to reach the goal — and earn stars based on how elegant your solution is.
A daily mental gym for anyone who used to love arithmetic, or wishes they did. Quick rounds, deep replayability.

features.title: Six dice puzzles
features.text: Add, subtract, multiply, divide. Reach the target.

features.title: Star ratings
features.text: Find the optimal solution to earn three stars.

features.title: Quick sessions
features.text: One puzzle = one minute. Perfect filler.

features.title: Brain training
features.text: Mental math without the boredom of homework.

games.name: Infinity Labyrinth
games.description: 100 handcrafted maze levels + a fog-of-war battle royale. Navigate. Outlast. Win.
games.tagline: Navigate hand-crafted mazes. Outlast in fog-of-war battles.
games.pageDescription: Navigate hand-crafted mazes. Outlast in fog-of-war battles.
games.lead: Mazes for solo runs. Battle royale for the bold.
aboutParagraphs: 100 hand-crafted maze levels to solve at your own rhythm — square or hexagonal, simple or devious.
Plus a fog-of-war battle royale mode where you and other players race through the same maze. Last one out wins.

features.title: 100 hand-crafted levels
features.text: Square and hexagonal mazes, designed by hand.

features.title: Battle royale mode
features.text: Online fog-of-war race against other players.

features.title: Daily replay
features.text: New mazes generated daily for endless practice.

features.title: Pure navigation
features.text: No combat, no power-ups. Just pathfinding.

games.privacyPolicyHtml:
Overview

Infinity Labyrinth is a maze puzzle game developed by an independent creator. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data is collected, how it is used, and your rights regarding that data.

Data We Collect

The App itself does not collect any personal information. However, we use third-party services that may collect data:

  • Google AdMob — used to display advertisements. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data to serve relevant ads.
  • Game progress — your completed levels and game state are stored locally on your device only using AsyncStorage. This data never leaves your device.
  • Battle Royale mode — multiplayer session data (e.g. anonymized match results) may be processed temporarily to enable online gameplay. No personally identifiable information is stored on our servers.

Advertising

The App displays ads through Google AdMob, including interstitial and rewarded video ads. We request non-personalized ads where possible. For more information: policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

Data Sharing

Data Retention

Local game data is stored on your device and can be cleared at any time by uninstalling the App. We do not retain any data on our own servers.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, delete or opt out of personalized advertising. On Android: Settings → Google → Ads. On iOS: Settings → Privacy → Tracking.

Changes to This Policy
